summary_en: 2,395,900 shares acquired cumulatively (0.55% of outstanding) for ¥9.999B through May 31, 2026. Authorization: 10M shares (2.3% S/O) / ¥50B limit through March 31, 2027. Open-market method on Tokyo Stock Exchange.
title_en: Notification Regarding Status of Acquisition of Own Shares
translation_en_brief:
On June 1, 2026, OBIC Co., Ltd. (ticker 4684) disclosed progress on its share buyback program authorized by board resolution on April 21, 2026. During May 2026, the company acquired 1,713,300 shares for ¥7.075 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.

Cumulatively as of May 31, 2026, the company has acquired 2,395,900 shares for ¥9.9996 billion. The authorization permits acquisition of up to 10 million shares (2.3% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate price of ¥50 billion. The acquisition period runs from April 22, 2026 through March 31, 2027. All purchases are executed through open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange.
